title: Biomes Barkover
description: Biomes Barkover drops bark from Biomes Markover trees when they
body:
This mod is an extension for the mod "Treebark".

 

Requires: [Tree Bark](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-bark) and [Biome Makeover by Lemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-makeover)

 

This mod adds bark from "Biomes Makeover" trees to the game that is obtained when debarking (drop number configurable in the Treebark config).
This bark can be used as fuel, for crafting paper or can be reattached to the corresponding tree trunk by right-clicking.
- minimum of bark in hand = drop from block e.g.: Oak Log dropped 4 = 4 for rebark, Oak Wood dropped 6 = 6 for rebark.
